meaning: n.平纹,斑猫vt.使起波纹adj.平纹织物的,起波纹的
examples: Is it possible to train your Tabby?
Tabby is my birthday present from Grandma.
She lived defiantly alone except for Binky, her tabby cat.
Toots, a seven-year-old male tabby cat, had crawled deep into pipes underneath the property in south west Scotland.
The hyena man will push them away when they get too aggressive as though he is handling the family tabby cat.
